mapper.select:
SELECT t1.* FROM fin_month_record t1 INNER JOIN (SELECT MR_BOOK_ID, MAX(CONCAT(MR_YEAR, LPAD(MR_MONTH, 2, '0'))) AS max_ym FROM fin_month_record WHERE MR_IS_DELETED = 0 GROUP BY MR_BOOK_ID) t2 ON t1.MR_BOOK_ID = t2.MR_BOOK_ID AND CONCAT(t1.MR_YEAR, LPAD(t1.MR_MONTH, 2, '0')) = t2.max_ym WHERE t1.MR_IS_DELETED = 0 AND t1.MR_BOOK_ID IN
#{bookId}
